_meta.purpose: Machine-readable registry of curator overrides where dataset's q.c is medically correct but disagrees with IMA's published answer key. Pinned by tests/curatorOverridesRatchet.test.js — flips will fail loud.
_meta.note_94_prior: 94 prior overrides documented in .audit_logs/review/{tag}.md evidence sheets (per-tag Markdown narratives). Not yet machine-extracted. This file currently pins the 16 fresh overrides from Tracks J+L+O (2026-05-04). Append further entries as they're audited.

overrides.rationale: Polymicrobial infection requires broad-spectrum; cefazolin (IMA pick) insufficient. Hazzard Ch 46.
Low transferrin rules out IDA; iron+transferrin+ferritin pattern is textbook ACD. Treat infection.
IDSA 2017+ guidelines: fulminant CDI requires PO vanco + IV metronidazole. IMA's PO metronidazole predates update.
Elevated TSH + Wolff-Chaikoff pattern is expected, not pathologic. Beta-blockers inappropriate.
IMA appeal accepted all four answers — multi-accept question.
RAMIPRIL alone — HR 58 contraindicates BB, controlled BP makes lerc redundant, LVEF 45% needs ACE-I.
AEIOU + severe AS context: pulmonary edema refractory to volume = absolute indication.
Pamidronate is IMWG traditional first-line. Denosumab non-inferior but alternative.
ANA- is the only PMR-supportive feature among options. Microcytic anemia + RF+ argue against PMR.
Sleep study — classic OSA picture. AI agrees. IMA's anticholinergic pick is wrong.
Inform patient — Law 1996 §13-15 is absolute. IMA's defer-to-family pick is illegal.
Curator override on uncertain Brookdale figure. 3-way split with no clear winner; canonical preserved.
Textbook prodromal synucleinopathy. AI agrees. IMA multi-accept misses the correct answer.
<2% mortality at CURB-65=1 → community-treated. AI agrees. IMA's >20% pick is wrong.
Rivaroxaban does not prolong QT; FQs (levofloxacin) do. AI agrees. IMA's pick is wrong.
KDIGO threshold Hgb 10 — at 11.1, no treatment. 3-way split; canonical is best-defensible.
